Field Study Journal No. 7 — Subject: Daniele D'Agnelli

FIELD JOURNAL — OBSERVATIONS ON PROFESSIONAL GROWTH

botanist: daniele d'agnelli | location: london | season: 15th year

SPECIMEN: PRACTICE CULTIVATION (DELOITTE, 2018-2021)

the most remarkable specimen in the collection. planted the first seed of an anaplan practice at deloitte uk. soil conditions: zero existing practitioners. no root system. no canopy.

through careful cultivation — three years of client work, recruitment, training, and knowledge transfer — the specimen grew to 25+ practitioners. a self-sustaining ecosystem. the practice survived and thrived after the original botanist departed. that is the mark of true cultivation.

SPECIMEN: TEAM GROWTH (C3 AI, 2021-PRESENT)

the current garden: 70+ resources across app dev, data science, qa, devops. a 20+ cross-functional team directly led. the organism has reached programme-level scale — $15m budget, operations spanning 100+ sites.

ROOT SYSTEM

bsc computer science (bari) → software engineer → senior consultant → management consultant → manager → senior engagement manager. each layer of growth built on the one beneath.

NOTES: the subject shows no signs of dormancy.
